gaps.snippet: fn parse_spans (text : & str , depth : u8) -> Vec < Span < '_ > > { let mut out = Vec :: new () ; if depth >= MAX_DEPTH { if ! text . is_empty () { out . push (Span :: Text (text)) ; } return out ; } let b = text . as_bytes () ; let mut i = 0 ; let mut lit = 0 ; while i < b . len () { let matched = match b [i] { b'`' => match_code (text , i) , b'*' if b . get (i + 1) == Some (& b'*') => match_strong (text , i , depth) , b'*' => match_em (text , i , b'*' , depth) , b'_' => match_em (text , i , b'_' , depth) , b'[' => match_link (text , i , depth) , _ => None , } ; if let Some ((span , end)) = matched { if lit < i { out . push (Span :: Text (& text [lit .. i])) ; } out . push (span) ; i = end ; lit = end ; } else { i = advance (text , i) ; } } if lit < b . len () { out . push (Span :: Text (& text [lit ..])) ; } out }
